000.reason: Elevated eyes and head read up.

022.5.reason: Slight right yaw plus elevated eyes.

067.5.reason: Strong right profile retains upward eye angle.

112.5.reason: Right profile with lowered eyes and muzzle.

135.reason: Clear right yaw and downward pitch.

157.5.reason: Slight right yaw remains through near-full down.

180.reason: Unmistakable down pose with repaired scalp intact.

202.5.reason: Slight left yaw plus downward eyes.

225.reason: Clear left yaw and downward pitch.

247.5.reason: Strong left profile retains downward eye angle.

292.5.reason: Left profile with rising eyes and muzzle.

315.reason: Clear left yaw and upward pitch.

337.5.reason: Subtle left yaw plus strong upward pitch transitions naturally into 000.

axis_evidence.horizontal: Right-side diagonals progressively yaw eyes, nose, muzzle, and profile screen-right while left-side diagonals mirror screen-left; 337.5 remains subtly left between 315 and 000.
axis_evidence.vertical: 000 to 090 progressively reduces upward pitch, 090 to 180 gains downward pitch, and the pattern mirrors continuously through 270 back to 000.

review_warnings: The 337.5 horizontal cue is blind-ambiguous at 192x208; labeled landmarks and the smooth 315 -> 337.5 -> 000 sequence confirm up-left without reversal.
